'''Roqoo Depot''' was a refueling station and supply base located in the [[Hapes Cluster/Legends|Hapes Cluster]]. It was here that [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Masters]] [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke]] and [[Mara Jade Skywalker]] [[Duel on Roqoo Depot|dueled]] the [[Sith Lord/Legends|Sith Lady]] [[Lumiya]] and her apprentice, [[Alema Rar]].

Later, it was the place where the [[Hapan]]s held [[Ship (Sith Meditation Sphere)|''Ship'']] after they found it abandoned. Alema Rar returned here for the [[Starship/Legends|ship]], causing much turmoil after a freighter [[Captain/Legends|captain]] had made the mistake of remarking on her deformities. She responded by inflicting wounds similar to her own-not only on the captain, but on his entire crew, as well.

==Appearances==
